Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Reroute near Commercial/102nd
ShortDescription: #71 71st/South Shore buses are rrtd via Commercial, 95th, Escanaba, 94th, then resume their normal route on Commercial due to street blockage nr Commercial/92nd

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Commercial, 95th, Escanaba, 94th, then resume their normal route on Commercial.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Commercial/92nd.

Headline: No Trains Between Cermak-Chinatown and 63rd/Dan Ryan
ShortDescription: Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Cermak-Chinatown and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Sox-35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between Cermak-Chinatown and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Sox-35th.

As a result, trains are operating in two sections:

  • between Howard and Cermak-Chinatown, and,
  • between 63rd/Dan Ryan and 95th/Dan Ryan, only.

Shuttle buses are available between Roosevelt and 63rd/Dan Ryan to provide connecting service.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
